benefits.description: Dull ache went away within a week; shoulder felt like 'WD-40' was squirted into it; improved range of motion
Accelerated recovery process; allowed return to pickleball with dominant arm by week 12 and return to strength training

protocol_notes: 10 weeks post-op from rotator cuff, labrum and bicep tenodesis surgery; injected Wolverine compound into side deltoid; returned to pickleball and started StrongLifts by week 12; currently uses peptides as-needed for recovery or overuse stress; also mentioned experience with buddy who used same protocol at .30 cc twice daily for 2 weeks then .20 cc twice daily for 8 weeks
